title: Grammitis alsophilicola

The health benefits of Grammitis alsophilicola include its potential in treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. taxonomy: Grammitis alsophilicola is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It is a type of epiphytic fern, which means it grows on other plants for support. The classification of Grammitis alsophilicola is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Division: Pteridophyta, Class: Polypodiopsida, Order: Polypodiales, Family: Polypodiaceae, Genus: Grammitis, Species: G. alsophilicola.
